Home → Discography → Countdown to Armageddon

Countdown to Armageddon

2011 · CNO Records

The album is the first chapter in the Armageddon trilogy, released through CNO Records. AC Killer first met Bizzy Bone at an autograph signing at a record store in Los Angeles in 2007. Bizzy felt that AC reminded him of his brother, the late Capo. They quickly developed strong chemistry, and the very next day AC brought his studio equipment to Bizzy’s hotel, where they recorded their first song together. The album is fully produced by CNO in-house producer Heinz and features appearances from Bone and Mo Thugs affiliates.

"Get me the paper, Let me read while I hold my pistol."

— Orghanization of Thugs
01 Intro produced by Heinz ▷
02 True Spit produced by Heinz ▷
03 Organization of Thugs produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone ▷
04 Cheaterz produced by Heinz ▷
05 Stone Cold Bone produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone ▷
06 Adam & Eve produced by Heinz ▷
07 One True God produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone ▷
08 Warriors produced by Heinz feat. Krayzie Bone ▷
09 Fuck a Bitch produced by Heinz ▷
10 You Ain't produced by Heinz ▷
11 Voices produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone & Felicia ▷
12 Where You Running To produced by Heinz feat. Flesh-N-Bone ▷
13 Forgiveness produced by Heinz feat. Rachelle ▷
14 Ghetto News produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone ▷
15 Searching for Perfection produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone ▷
16 Ride to the Rhythm produced by Heinz ▷
17 I Know produced by Heinz feat. Layzie Bone ▷
18 Hustle On produced by Heinz feat. Felicia, Keef G & Big Sloan ▷
19 Say My Name produced by Heinz feat. Thin C ▷
